personalInfo.name: Herberth Castro
personalInfo.title: Full Stack Developer & Product Leader
personalInfo.summary:
Seasoned Software Developer and Product Leader with 20+ years of experience designing and delivering scalable web, game, and enterprise applications for global companies.
Strong technical background in C#, React, Angular, Node.js, TypeScript and SQL databases combined with proven expertise in product management, UX design, and agile team leadership.
I excel at bridging the gap between creative vision and technical execution, leading projects from concept to deployment in remote, multicultural environments.

Key strengths: Product vision, architecture design, team mentoring, creative problem solving, and full-stack development.

experience.title: Head of Product / Lead Developer
description: Led product development for multiple live-gaming platforms (UI, streaming systems, 3D chroma studios, back-office tools).
Spearheaded a full facelift of all HTML5 products, modernizing UX and performance.
Built a web-based analytics tool in React for monitoring streaming KPIs and usage.
Oversaw cross-functional teams and product roadmaps across several studio locations.

experience.title: Lead / Senior Developer
description: Served as Lead Developer for Project: ECOM Agro-Industrial (Switzerland), a multinational trading company (coffee, cocoa, cotton) with 40+ offices worldwide. within international Agile teams for large-scale enterprise applications.
Led the front-end architecture using Angular, ensuring component reusability, scalability, and performance optimization across multiple projects.
Collaborated directly with product owners and solution architects to define UI/UX flows and API integrations.
Designed and implemented the SMS Web and Android Application, a global system for collecting and distributing agricultural data between technicians, farmers, and crops in 35+ countries.
Integrated OData and Web API back-ends for dynamic grid views and large dataset pagination on a C#, .NetCore backend.
Implemented real-time notifications and offline sync logic using Azure Service Fabric.
Conducted code reviews, mentoring, and front-end training for new developers.

experience.title: Senior Creative Engineer
description: Developed SteelSeries Aim Master, a 3D web-based FPS game using React, Three.js, and .NET.
Designed game logic, UI, and reward systems integrated with AWS services.

experience.title: Senior Developer
description: Built LFO Calculator and TDC Bikes apps for the University of Washington and Seattle County.
Created an Outlook Add-in integrating Pipeline Deals API and SharePoint.
Developed Sales & Delivery Tracker, an internal project management and cost control tool.

experience.title: Lead Software Developer
description: Worked on project: Contract Management System for Wells Fargo DSSG an enterprise web application designed to track, calculate, and manage lease agreements for more than 10,000 ATM sites across the United States. The system automated rent calculations and contract renewals, integrating complex business logic and financial compliance requirements.
Led the full-cycle development of the Contract Management System, from requirements gathering and system design to deployment and maintenance.
Designed and implemented automated rent and contract renewal modules, reducing manual errors and significantly improving process efficiency.
Created dynamic reports and dashboards using SQL Server Reporting Services (SSRS) and optimized stored procedures for faster data retrieval.
Coordinated closely with QA teams, business analysts, and stakeholders to ensure deliverables met corporate standards and compliance policies.
Ensured adherence to financial security and compliance protocols throughout development.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Project: BrandTracker (Leo Burnett / Coca-Cola)
Developed BrandTracker 3, a marketing campaign management platform for Coca-Cola and Fanta.
Implemented web service APIs for campaign analytics and data visualization.

experience.title: Senior Developer
description: Developed Bing Maps Mobile Framework for Microsoft (Windows Mobile 6.x).
Created SEO Report Tool for Microsoft's Skyrocket program.
Built AWS Web Manager, a tool for scheduling EC2 events (Start/Stop/Restart).

experience.title: Developer & Game Designer
description: Designed and developed Game Studio in C#, a proprietary engine for GBA/Nintendo DS.
Created Ecovolution, an educational RPG promoting environmental awareness.
Contributed to multiple outsourced game projects for Digital Blue.

projects.name: Magic Paws
projects.description: In this enchanting world, magical animals use love, light, and kindness to help children grow, heal, and learn. With songs, magical stories, and fun adventures, they teach empathy, curiosity, teamwork, and joy — one paw at a time.

projects.name: Ocean Speak
projects.description: Interactive speech-based underwater web game for children.
